infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mizanly needs camera access to create posts, stories, and reels
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mizanly needs microphone access for voice notes and video recording
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mizanly needs photo library access to share images and videos

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Mizanly to access your microphone for voice notes and video.
